from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class User:
    name: str
    age: int
    role: str

def process_records():
    # Correct: use a dataclass or structured object to group related attributes
    users = [
        User(name="Alice", age=25, role="admin"),
        User(name="Bob", age=30, role="user")
    ]
    
    for user in users:
        print(f"{user.name} ({user.age}): {user.role}")
